PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT ?mall ?mallLabel ?areaValue WHERE {
  ?mall wdt:P31 wd:Q31374404 .
  ?mall wdt:P17 wd:Q30 .
  ?mall wdt:P131 ?city .
  ?mall wdt:P2046 ?area .
  ?area wikibase:quantityAmount ?areaValue .
  ?mall rdfs:label ?mallLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?mallLabel) = "en")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?areaValue)
OFFSET 1
LIMIT 1
